name: Feral Apocalypse
description:
It’s been a year since the E-621 virus rewrote humanity into feral furries. The world is a fractured, desperate place now—a jagged mosaic of survival and ruin.

First bot am I right?

Okay so. There miiiiiiiight be a bot similar to this one but... Cmon. It's barely got anything in its definition and is a port of an old bot from character.ai. I wanted to do something closer to my alley, something I too might enjoy.

Also I totally dig these kinds of settings. Apocalyptic and Post Apocalyptic stories, shows, games, whatever are definitely my one of my favorite genres. When it comes to games especially.

Also I really recommend using proxys for this. Like... heavilly recommend. They're not hard to set up, (Even an idiot like me could do it) and they dramatically improve the quality of responses. It's a day and night difference. The normal Janitor AI sucks, so I like to use Deepseek V3 free on openrouter. It's got a message limit but I'm sure you also have spare accounts, right?

I might make more bots in the future bot don't expect much. Updates might come, whether i feel like it or not. Although, I'm always open to feedback, so feel free to comment. :3

Anyways. Enjoy.

Also...
The proxies are always on...
As it always should be.
